usage_mode.description: Controls compute/cost/scope for discretionary work. Core gate/tailor/track/comms quality is unchanged.

application_mode.description: Controls pursuit posture after discovery. Discovery stays recall-oriented; this changes promotion/review/apply behavior.

agent_voice.description: Controls how the agent talks to the user (not outbound artifact tone). exec-summary=1-3 lines lead with decision; standard=scannable bullets/short lines takeaway-first (DEFAULT); technical=more depth/jargon, still structured; verbose=full detail with headers/bullets. Semantics defined in AGENTS.md#mode-switches.

company_health.description: Controls when the company-health skill fires its (cost-bearing) role-scoped risk research. Absent = the defaults below. Never changes honesty/privacy gates; the rating is an internal signal only.

auto.description: Auto-fire the research on a stage transition (subject to fire_at_stage). false = manual-only.

fire_at_stage.description: Earliest stage that triggers an automatic run. interview (default) keeps the researched set tiny and high-value; applied is broad and costly; offer is the latest/cheapest.

manual_always.description: Allow on-demand runs at any stage when the user explicitly asks (e.g. before applying to a dream company).

recheck_days.description: Re-research a cached rating once it is older than this many days (or on a major stage transition); fresher ratings are reused without spending searches.
